summary: Great show with fabulous Terrapin Station and strong first set; recording noted as good sound
review: The reviewer raves about the performance, highlighting a stellar Terrapin Station, Women Are Smarter opener, Crazy Fingers, and a ripping Throwing Stones → Turn On Your Love Light sequence. The recording is described simply as "good sound," with no major technical complaints.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed 5‑star review praises the musical performance highly and mentions good sound quality, leading to a near‑top rating but limited confidence due to only one source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes "good sound" with no specific issues; no details on source (soundboard, audience, etc.).

standout_songs: Throwing Stones → Turn On Your Love Light
show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer describes the first set as fabulous and the second set opener as a treat, indicating strong pacing and flow throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Encore "Hello" sounded good according to reviewer.
